comments.text:
autoSWE picked up this issue (`ado:natedorr_testProject/testProject_28`).

**Available Commands:**
- `/plan` - Start a planning session (reads code, asks questions, posts a plan)
- `/plan --branch ` - Plan on a specific branch (default: main)
- `/fix` - Implement the fix (runs Claude with code-editing permissions)
- `/fix --branch ` - Fix on a specific branch (default: main)
- `/fix with ` - Same as /fix but appends guidance to the prompt
- `/pr` - Open a pull request from the current branch
- `/sync` - Pull the branch from upstream to keep it up to date
- `/retry` - Retry a failed task (resets attempt counter)
- `/skip` - Skip this issue
- `/abort` - Cancel the current task

You can add guidance: `/fix with performance focus`
